update_description_release_notes: Our new design provides easier access to the features you use most while on the go. This includes the homepage, account and order information, your cart and the ability to browse and discover Amazon departments, products, programs, and features. This update lets you connect your Apple Health data to your Amazon One Medical profile. This means: • Personalized health guidance — get insights from Health AI based on your actual sleep, activity, and heart rate data • Effortless tracking — your health data is automatically turned into actionable guidance by Health AI, no manual logging required. • Better care between visits — share daily vitals and trends with One Medical to help identify health issues early and take action sooner. Tap on medical care, then Health AI to get set up.
standardized_update_categories: UI / design changes; AI-related features; Personalization / recommendations; New product feature
standardized_update_summary: Added Health AI and Apple Health connectivity while continuing the broader navigation redesign.
data_quality_notes: App Store month/day entry normalized to 2026 from page context.

update_description_release_notes: We update the Uber app as often as possible to make it faster and more reliable for you. update_description_release_notes: Our mission is to deliver good by connecting people and possibility. If we can play a small role in helping you spend more time with your friends and family or get ahead on your favorite projects, then we have delivered good. We’re launching a new set of initiatives to deliver good within our communities, and you’ll see a new visual identity that reflects our spirit. Thank you for making DoorDash a success — we wouldn’t be here without you.
standardized_update_summary: Branding and community-mission update centered on visual identity changes rather than checkout or delivery mechanics.
